# startBrowsingForPeers()

**Instance Method**

Starts browsing for peers.

## Declaration

```swift
func startBrowsingForPeers()
```

## Discussion

After this method is called (until you call [doc://com.apple.multipeerconnectivity/documentation/MultipeerConnectivity/MCNearbyServiceBrowser/stopBrowsingForPeers()]), the framework calls your delegate’s [doc://com.apple.multipeerconnectivity/documentation/MultipeerConnectivity/MCNearbyServiceBrowserDelegate/browser(_:foundPeer:withDiscoveryInfo:)] and [doc://com.apple.multipeerconnectivity/documentation/MultipeerConnectivity/MCNearbyServiceBrowserDelegate/browser(_:lostPeer:)] methods as new peers are found and lost.

## Browsing for Peers

- **stopBrowsingForPeers()**: Stops browsing for peers.
